Portfolio

Egyptian cinema and television — boom operator, sound utility, and sound engineer across major Ramadan dramas, theatrical releases, and national advertising campaigns.

00 —

Career Arc

2022
Sound Utility
Entered professional production. Equipment handling, cable management, and on-set protocol across television and commercial shoots.
2023 — 2025
Boom Operator
Boom operator on 8 productions including الحشاشين — Egypt's largest Ramadan drama of 2024, directed by Peter Mimi for DMC.
2025 — Present
Sound Engineer
Lead sound on مبد تيرم, المتر سمير (2026), صقر و كناريا (2026) and 12 advertising campaigns including Vodafone, Spotify and Orange.
